body:
APPROVE
Implementation matches the spec precisely. Token classes applied symmetrically with dark-mode counterparts; dialog already had the required modal tokens, input gained the bordered/focus-lever style, and result items gained a hover state without disturbing the existing selected-state highlight. The committed build artifacts under `frontend/build/` are noise but don't affect correctness.
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260430T060904-bb0574b5/reviewer-stream.log
